label: Interhour of the Third Hour
description: The Interhour of the Third Hour (Mezhduchasiye) is a brief interstitial office appended to the Third Hour in monastic practice. It consists of three psalms, the Trisagion, a troparion of the day, and a Theotokion proper to this hour.

sections.label: Fixed Psalmody
sections.notes: The Interhour of the Third Hour appoints Psalms 34, 35, and 36 (LXX).

items.label: Psalm 34 (LXX) — Judge Thou, O Lord, them that harm me
Psalm 35 (LXX) — The transgression of the ungodly
Psalm 36 (LXX) — Fret not thyself because of evil-doers

sections.label: Troparia
sections.notes: The troparion of the day followed by the Theotokion of the Interhour of the Third Hour.

items.label: Troparion of the Day
items.note: Variable troparion: resolved via Menaion resolver or weekday-theme rubric by HorologionEngine.

items.label: Theotokion of the Interhour of the Third Hour

key.text:
Through the prayers of our holy fathers, Lord Jesus Christ our God, have mercy on us and save us.
Amen.
